title: gladiolus sufflavus
intro: Gladiolus sufflavus, also known as the yellow gladiolus or yellow sword lily, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family (Iridaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing pain and swelling, and preventing infection. The health benefits of Gladiolus sufflavus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Gladiolus sufflavus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
